name: Bacon, Walnut and Feta Focaccia
recipeIngredient: 1 Green onion, green part only, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the bacon in a skillet until it is crisp.
2. Drain the bacon on paper towels.
3. Crumble the bacon and arrange it on the focaccia.
4. Sprinkle with onion, walnuts, and feta cheese.
5. Place on a baking sheet.
6. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit until the cheese melts and ingredients are hot, 6 to 10 minutes.
7. Serve hot.
